commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps provider SDK tool-schema normalization and diagnostics with safe schema reads and adds regression tests for unreadable parameter and nested schema getters.

PR surface: Source +61, Tests +112. Total +173 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main directly reads tool schema fields in the provider helpers, and the PR body reports a focused unreadable-schema test that failed before the fix.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; this maintainer-labeled draft mainly needs normal maintainer readiness and CI handling.

target.title: fix(plugin-sdk): guard provider tool schema helpers
target.body:
## Summary

- harden provider SDK tool-schema normalization/inspection against unreadable tool schema fields
- preserve unreadable tools unchanged while continuing to normalize/diagnose healthy sibling tools
- add regression coverage for top-level `parameters` getter failures and nested schema traversal failures

## Verification

- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=/tmp/openclaw-vitest-next187-red nodenv exec node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/plugin-sdk/provider-tools.test.ts --testNamePattern="unreadable" --reporter=verbose` failed before the fix with `fuzzplugin parameters getter exploded`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=/tmp/openclaw-vitest-next187-rebase1 nodenv exec node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/plugin-sdk/provider-tools.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `nodenv exec node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/plugin-sdk/provider-tools.ts src/plugin-sdk/provider-tools.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: bad plugin/extension provider tool schemas can no longer crash provider-family schema normalization or diagnostics when `name`, `parameters`, or nested schema traversal throws.

Real environment tested: local focused Vitest shard in the linked gwt worktree, plus oxlint, diff-check, and branch autoreview.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: ran the provider SDK regression test file after rebasing on current `origin/main`, then ran oxlint, `git diff --check`, and branch autoreview.

Evidence after fix: `src/plugin-sdk/provider-tools.test.ts` passed 12/12 after the rebase; branch autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings and `overall: patch is correct (0.78)`.

Observed result after fix: unreadable provider tool schemas are skipped or preserved unchanged, and healthy sibling tools still normalize and report diagnostics.

What was not tested: broad `pnpm check:changed` was not run because Blacksmith Testbox is not authenticated in this environment and AWS Crabbox coordinator calls returned 401 on run history and lease creation.
target.author: vincentkoc
